name: Baselines Before Architecture: Evaluating Coding Agents for Autonomous Penetration Testing
summary: arXiv:2607.13085v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent autonomous penetration testing papers report high benchmark scores while adding multi-component security harnesses around frontier LLMs. Bec...
description: arXiv:2607.13085v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent autonomous penetration testing papers report high benchmark scores while adding multi-component security harnesses around frontier LLMs. Because these systems often change both architecture and backbone model, it is difficult to tell how much performance comes from the harness rather than from the underlying model. This paper presents a c...
author: Ananda Dhakal, Krish Neupane, Aarjan Chaudhary
